shadcn-html / link

CSS Only

Link

Styled anchor element for inline text links. Built on the native <a> element with variant support via data-variant. No JavaScript required.

Component Specification — components/link/link.md

Native basis

<a> element. Browser provides built-in navigation, visited state, and accessibility.

Web Platform APIs

<a> :focus-visible

Variants (data-variant)

(default)Primary color, underline on hover mutedMuted foreground, subtle

Default

Primary-colored link with underline that intensifies on hover.

Documentation Components GitHub 
<a class="link" href="/docs">Documentation</a>

Muted

Subtle link that transitions to foreground on hover.

Privacy Policy Terms of Service 
<a class="link" data-variant="muted" href="/privacy">Privacy Policy</a>

With Icon

Link accompanied by an icon — commonly used for external links.

View on GitHub 
<a class="link" href="https://github.com" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  View on GitHub
  <svg aria-hidden="true" width="14" height="14" ...>...</svg>
</a>

In Paragraph

Links flow naturally within body text.

The king thought long and hard, and finally came up with a brilliant plan: he would tax the jokes in the kingdom. Read more in the official decree. 

<p>...came up with <a class="link" href="/plan">a brilliant plan</a>...</p>

Full specification → components/link/link.md
